description: End-to-end API interface for the AI Research Assistant prototype.  This module exposes REST endpoints for document ingestion and query handling, integrating all core components of the system including document processing, semantic retrieval, LLM reasoning, and citation tracking.  It demonstrates how the full pipeline operates in a production-like environment, enabling users to upload research papers and receive context-aware, citation-backed responses.  The design also supports validation through structured outputs, making it suitable for testing, monitoring, and real-world deployment scenarios.
